title: The Telescope That Captured Andromeda

scenes.text: An everyday telescope managed to capture breathtaking images of an entire galaxy!
Amateur astronomers can now capture the Andromeda galaxy with the right settings.
This spiral galaxy is over two million light-years away, yet now visible to hobbyists.
With patience and practice, you can photograph distant galaxies too!
scenes.label: DREAM OF GALAXIES

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: With an everyday telescope, capturing the Andromeda galaxy is becoming a reality. Follow for more breathtaking astronomy tips!
